summary: Frontend testing for MegaRadio genre filter by country bug. Testing revealed MIXED results - Country selection works and Home Screen refetches correctly with Turkey country, but Genre Detail page shows 'country: undefined' in console logs even after country is set. This indicates a potential bug where the country is not being passed to the Genre Stations API.

minor.issue: Multiple 400 status errors from favicon/logo requests - likely invalid image URLs in station data

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Discover' text navigates to About page instead of Home tab - navigation text collision

integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL: Genre detail page shows 'country: undefined' in API call even after country is set to Turkey. Console shows: '[GenreDetail] Fetching stations with country: undefined slug: pop' despite Turkey being selected. This causes global stations to be shown instead of Turkish stations.
integration_issues.root_cause_analysis: The genre-detail.tsx line 90 uses 'const countryForApi = isLoaded ? (country || undefined) : undefined'. The issue appears to be that when navigating to genre detail page, either: 1) isLoaded is false at render time, 2) country is null/empty, or 3) the component doesn't re-render/re-fetch when country changes in the store.

issues: Discoverable genre images fail to load (404 from themegaradio.com) - falling back to gradient colors

home_screen_loads.evidence: [stationService] Got 12 popular stations for global, then 12 popular stations for Turkey after country change

country_change_to_turkey.evidence: [LocationStore] setCountryManual: {countryName: Turkey, englishName: Turkey, nativeName: Türkiye, countryCode: TR}

genre_detail_with_country_filter.evidence: [GenreDetail] Fetching stations with country: undefined slug: pop - Country parameter not being passed to API, resulting in global stations instead of Turkish stations

discoverable_genres_shows_3.evidence: [genreService] getDiscoverableGenres result: 3 genres - Folk music, Jazz Music, Rock

action_items: CRITICAL BUG: Genre Detail page does not pass country filter to API. Fix in app/genre-detail.tsx - the countryForApi variable shows 'undefined' in console logs even when Turkey is selected. The issue is likely a timing/reactivity issue where useLocationStore().country is not available when the hook runs.
Suggested fix: Add useEffect to refetch genre stations when country changes, similar to how HomeScreen handles country changes
Alternative fix: Ensure useGenreStations hook invalidates and refetches when country changes in query key
critical_code_review_comments: genre-detail.tsx line 90: countryForApi = isLoaded ? (country || undefined) : undefined - This should work but country is coming as null/undefined
The query key in useQueries.ts line 176 includes country, but if countryForApi is undefined on first render, it won't refetch when country loads
Consider adding a refetch mechanism when country changes from undefined to a value

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Country selection works, but Genre Detail filter is NOT working

context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL BUG FOUND: Genre detail page does NOT filter stations by country even when country is set to Turkey. Console shows '[GenreDetail] Fetching stations with country: undefined' despite Turkey being selected. The fix needs to ensure country is properly passed to useGenreStations hook and the query refetches when country changes.

original_issues: 1. Genres don't filter by country - Pop still shows global stations even after changing country
2. GPS/Geolocation not working - Station Near You and auto country detection not working after fresh install
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Genre Detail page uses useLocationStore() to get country, but the country value appears to be undefined when the component mounts. The console clearly shows '[GenreDetail] Fetching stations with country: undefined slug: pop' even after Turkey was selected. This is likely because: 1) The store subscription in the component doesn't trigger a re-render/re-fetch when country changes, OR 2) The component renders before the country is loaded from the store.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_suggestion: Add useEffect in genre-detail.tsx to watch for country changes and call refetch() when country changes. Similar pattern used in HomeScreen: useEffect with [countryEnglish] dependency that calls queryClient.invalidateQueries and refetch.
rca_of_the_issue.verification_needed: After fix, navigate to Pop genre with Turkey selected and verify API is called with country=Türkiye and stations shown are from Turkey
